name: necronomidoc
description: Self-hostable team documentation server: extracts docs from code, serves a doc site and an MCP endpoint.

scripts.build: tsc -b packages/docmodel packages/adapter-ts packages/adapter-markdown packages/adapter-openapi packages/adapter-python packages/adapter-csharp packages/enrichment packages/mcp packages/server packages/cli
scripts.build:all: npm run build && npm run build:site
scripts.clean: tsc -b --clean packages/docmodel packages/adapter-ts packages/adapter-markdown packages/adapter-openapi packages/adapter-python packages/adapter-csharp packages/enrichment packages/mcp packages/server packages/cli && rimraf packages/site/dist
